title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXIV. Natural History.
content:
Dickery, dickery, dare,
        The pig flew up in the air;
        The man in brown soon brought him down,
        Dickery, dickery, dare.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXIV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
